defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Cristiano Ronaldo's face celebrating intensely in a white Real Madrid jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Why letting Cristiano Ronaldo leave was Real Madrid's biggest mistake - he scored 450 goals in 438 games and won four Champions Leagues in five years, and is still their all time top scorer
videos.video_script: In twenty eighteen, Real Madrid let this man walk away. Four hundred and fifty goals in four hundred and thirty eight games. Four Champions Leagues in just five seasons. He is still the greatest goalscorer in the club's entire history. Seven years later, nobody has come close to replacing him. The only way to stop him was to let him leave. So you have to wonder,
